title: Evangelion NERV Countdown Siren sound
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion NERV Countdown/Siren sound             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sat Mar 21, 2009 2:44 pm More or less I'm looking for the countdown timer sound effect. Having it start with the simple sound of the clock ticking down to the dramatic red screen siren going off. The sound of the Siren going off while the Military is attacking in EOE will work as well. I'm searching Youtube for a version I could rip but I thought maybe one of you may have it. Thank you very much.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sat Mar 21, 2009 2:51 pm if you know of an episode that has that part i'll rip it off a dvd for you, i may want that sound too

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Mar 24, 2009 9:49 am I have the siren but no ticking.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Mar 24, 2009 12:04 pm You should upload it so we can use it

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 24, 2009 5:18 pm I would have looked for both if I was entirely sure exactly what was being asked for and had more specific parameters.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Tue Mar 24, 2009 5:30 pm would the sounds from the iphone app be what your looking for? http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kNfPG5jL2mU

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Mar 24, 2009 6:05 pm More or less but might there be a version without the music, not that I don't love the music or anything. The Siren would still be very nice.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 24, 2009 6:26 pm Just FYI, that's not a "siren". It's a "power-down" sound. Part of the reason why I had no idea what you were talking about. More or less but might there be a version without the music

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Mar 24, 2009 6:31 pm Evangelion 64 has an unlockable feature that lets you play all of the sounds and music isolated. That'd be the most obvious place to rip from.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 24, 2009 6:34 pm And if you can open those ipod apps on your computer, that would be an obvious place, as well, although I have no idea how those applications work. Someone managed to make a full-screen video of the timer (albeit this time with "Harbinger of Tragedy" playing), so... maybe it's possible.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Mar 24, 2009 7:02 pm During Angel attacks, is there not a Siren that sounds when something bad happens which is every time? Could one of you please rip them for me, I am currently helping my sister.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 24, 2009 7:41 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: Could one of you please rip them for me, I am currently helping my sister.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Mar 24, 2009 9:07 pm I didn't ask them to Reichu! Damn...Anyway, Here..Ill try to find one for you guys. http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9hLLGKX5PVE at 3:37 Or the countdown timer http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=HI3Q485CHN4&feature=related at 1:54 esk

[]:             Quote Post by Deathmask » Tue Mar 24, 2009 9:16 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: I didn't ask them to Reichu!

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Tue Mar 24, 2009 9:17 pm By that I thought he had them already since he knew where to get them from the Eva 64 game. If I had known that he did not then I would have sat out to find them myself but I was busy helping my sister. Look lets not fight alright..I've had a very stressful week with the family after running away and all so lets try to keep the topic on track alright..No fighting.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Tue Mar 24, 2009 9:25 pm couldnt really tell what sound you wanted from the first clip, but the sound in the second clip was the same as the end of my link that i posted

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Wed Mar 25, 2009 4:07 am :) Didn't you check your inbox?

[]:             Quote Post by Joppu » Mon May 31, 2010 11:31 am Epic bump. Well the siren effect gotta be one of these three: [url]http://joppu.22.fi/sfx/klaxon_1.mp3[/url] [url]http://joppu.22.fi/sfx/klaxon_2.mp3[/url] [url]http://joppu.22.fi/sfx/klaxon_3.mp3[/url] They are all from Hollywood Edge sound effect libraries, Premiere Edition and The Edge Edition, respectively. I'm pretty sure they didn't use any other klaxon effects in Evangelion. Trust me, I know this. I also have the SFX for the activation timer thingy, if you need that.

[]:             Quote Post by Count_Paradox » Sat Jun 11, 2011 5:30 am @Joppu Do you still have copies of these sounds? the links are dead DX Hope so! Im looking for interesting MAGI like sounds for my phone :3
